## 1. `scanner-desktop/ScannerApp/` — All `.cs` Files

**Source files (production code):**

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Program.cs` | Entry point — initializes `ApiService`, shows `LoginForm`, then launches `MainForm` |
| `Forms/LoginForm.cs` | WinForms login dialog — collects credentials and authenticates against the API |
| `Forms/MainForm.cs` | Primary scanning UI — orchestrates scanner hardware, barcode reading, page capture, and submission |
| `Services/ApiService.cs` | HTTP client wrapper — handles all REST calls to the Node API (login, settings, barcode lookup, save booklet) |
| `Services/ScannerService.cs` | TWAIN/WIA scanner abstraction — configures DPI/color/duplex and drives page acquisition |
| `Services/BarcodeService.cs` | Barcode detection — reads ZXing or similar to decode the booklet barcode from the first scanned page |
| `Models/ApiModels.cs` | Plain C# POCOs for all API request/response shapes (LoginRequest, ScanSettings, SaveBookletRequest, etc.) |
| `Utils/HashHelper.cs` | Computes SHA-256 hash of a file path or byte array for booklet file integrity |
| `Utils/ImageHelper.cs` | Saves a `Bitmap` as JPEG with configurable quality using `ImageCodecInfo` |

**Auto-generated build artifacts (obj/):**

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `obj/Debug/net8.0-windows/ScannerApp.AssemblyInfo.cs` | Auto-generated assembly metadata (version, title, etc.) |
| `obj/Debug/net8.0-windows/.NETCoreApp,Version=v8.0.AssemblyAttributes.cs` | Auto-generated target-framework attribute |
| `obj/Debug/net8.0-windows/ScannerApp.GlobalUsings.g.cs` | Auto-generated implicit global `using` directives |

---

## 2. `api/src/modules/scan/` — All Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `scan.repository.js` | Raw SQL data access — all DB reads/writes for booklets, pages, settings, productivity, and sync queue |
| `scan.service.js` | Business logic layer — validates inputs, enforces duplicate detection, orchestrates repository calls |
| `scan.controller.js` | Express request handlers — extracts params from `req`, calls service, returns `ok`/`created` responses |
| `scan.routes.js` | Express router — wires up 6 endpoints with `authenticate`, `auditLog`, and `scanLimiter` middleware; full OpenAPI JSDoc |
| `files.routes.js` | Separate authenticated router — serves stored JPEG page images from disk by `bookletId`/`pageNumber` |

---

## 3. Full Content of `scan.repository.js`

```1:146:api/src/modules/scan/scan.repository.js
export default class ScanRepository {
  constructor(db) {
    this.db = db;
  }

  async getScanSettings(locationId) { ... }      // location, exams, papers, workstations + scanner defaults
  async getBookletExpectedPages(bookletId) { ... } // JOIN booklet → paper → exam
  async lookupBookletByBarcode(barcodeValue) { ... }
  async getPaperSettings(examId, paperCode) { ... }
  async createBooklet(booklet) { ... }            // INSERT into Scan_Booklets (16 columns)
  async createBookletPage(page) { ... }           // INSERT into Scan_BookletPages (10 columns)
  async getBookletsByDate(locationId, scanDate) { ... }
  async getProductivitySummary(locationId, scanDate) { ... } // GROUP BY CreatedBy
  async enqueueSyncBooklet(bookletId) { ... }     // INSERT into Scan_SyncQueue
}
```

Full verbatim content:

```1:146:api/src/modules/scan/scan.repository.js
export default class ScanRepository {
  constructor(db) {
    this.db = db;
  }

  async getScanSettings(locationId) {
    const [locations] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT LocationID, LocationCode, LocationName FROM Scan_Locations WHERE LocationID = ? AND IsDeleted = 0`,
      [locationId]
    );

    const [exams] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT ExamID, ExamCode, ExamName, ExamYear FROM Scan_Exams WHERE IsActive = 1 AND IsDeleted = 0`
    );

    const [papers] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT PaperID, ExamID, PaperCode, PaperName, TotalPages, BookletPageCounts
       FROM Scan_Papers WHERE IsDeleted = 0`
    );

    const [workstations] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT WorkstationID, WorkstationCode, WorkstationName
       FROM Scan_Workstations WHERE LocationID = ? AND IsActive = 1 AND IsDeleted = 0`,
      [locationId]
    );

    return {
      location: locations[0] || null,
      exams,
      papers,
      workstations,
      defaults: {
        dpi: 300,
        colorMode: 'color',
        pageSize: 'A4',
        duplexMode: 'simplex',
        imageFormat: 'jpeg',
        jpegQuality: 85,
      },
    };
  }

  async getBookletExpectedPages(bookletId) {
    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT b.BookletID, b.ExamID, b.PaperID, b.TotalPagesExpected,
              p.PaperCode, p.PaperName, p.BookletPageCounts,
              e.ExamCode, e.ExamName
       FROM Scan_Booklets b
       JOIN Scan_Papers p ON b.PaperID = p.PaperID
       JOIN Scan_Exams e ON b.ExamID = e.ExamID
       WHERE b.BookletID = ? AND b.IsDeleted = 0`,
      [bookletId]
    );
    return rows[0] || null;
  }

  async lookupBookletByBarcode(barcodeValue) {
    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT BookletID, ExamID, PaperID, TotalPagesExpected, ValidationStatus
       FROM Scan_Booklets
       WHERE BookletID = ? AND IsDeleted = 0`,
      [barcodeValue]
    );
    return rows[0] || null;
  }

  async getPaperSettings(examId, paperCode) {
    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT p.PaperID, p.PaperCode, p.PaperName, p.TotalPages, p.BookletPageCounts
       FROM Scan_Papers p
       WHERE p.ExamID = ? AND p.PaperCode = ? AND p.IsDeleted = 0`,
      [examId, paperCode]
    );
    return rows[0] || null;
  }

  async createBooklet(booklet) {
    const [result] = await this.db.execute(
      `INSERT INTO Scan_Booklets
        (BookletID, ExamID, PaperID, LocationID, CentreCode, WorkstationID,
         TotalPagesExpected, TotalPagesScanned, ValidationStatus,
         FileHashSHA256, FilePath, UploadStatus, ScanDate,
         CreatedBy, CreatedFromIP, CreatedFromSystem)
       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
      [
        booklet.bookletId, booklet.examId, booklet.paperId,
        booklet.locationId, booklet.centreCode, booklet.workstationId,
        booklet.totalPagesExpected, booklet.totalPagesScanned,
        booklet.validationStatus, booklet.fileHash, booklet.filePath,
        booklet.uploadStatus || 'Local', booklet.scanDate,
        booklet.createdBy, booklet.createdFromIP, booklet.createdFromSystem,
      ]
    );
    return result;
  }

  async createBookletPage(page) {
    const [result] = await this.db.execute(
      `INSERT INTO Scan_BookletPages
        (BookletID, PageNumber, ImagePath, PageHash, BarcodeData, ValidationStatus, IsRoughPage,
         CreatedBy, CreatedFromIP, CreatedFromSystem)
       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
      [
        page.bookletId, page.pageNumber, page.imagePath, page.pageHash,
        page.barcodeData, page.validationStatus || 'Valid', page.isRoughPage || 0,
        page.createdBy, page.createdFromIP, page.createdFromSystem,
      ]
    );
    return result;
  }

  async getBookletsByDate(locationId, scanDate) {
    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT b.BookletID, b.ExamID, b.PaperID, b.TotalPagesExpected,
              b.TotalPagesScanned, b.ValidationStatus, b.ScanDate,
              b.CreatedBy, b.CreatedAt
       FROM Scan_Booklets b
       WHERE b.LocationID = ? AND b.ScanDate = ? AND b.IsDeleted = 0
       ORDER BY b.CreatedAt DESC`,
      [locationId, scanDate]
    );
    return rows;
  }

  async getProductivitySummary(locationId, scanDate) {
    const [rows] = await this.db.execute(
      `SELECT b.CreatedBy AS username, COUNT(*) AS bookletCount,
              SUM(b.TotalPagesScanned) AS totalPages,
              SUM(CASE WHEN b.ValidationStatus = 'Valid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS validCount,
              SUM(CASE WHEN b.ValidationStatus != 'Valid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS invalidCount
       FROM Scan_Booklets b
       WHERE b.LocationID = ? AND b.ScanDate = ? AND b.IsDeleted = 0
       GROUP BY b.CreatedBy`,
      [locationId, scanDate]
    );
    return rows;
  }

  async enqueueSyncBooklet(bookletId) {
    const [result] = await this.db.execute(
      `INSERT INTO Scan_SyncQueue (BookletID, SyncStatus) VALUES (?, 'Pending')`,
      [bookletId]
    );
    return result;
  }
}
```

---

## 4. Full Content of `scan.routes.js`

```1:171:api/src/modules/scan/scan.routes.js
import { Router } from 'express';
import ScanRepository from './scan.repository.js';
import ScanService from './scan.service.js';
import ScanController from './scan.controller.js';
import { getScanDb } from '../../config/database.js';
import { authenticate } from '../../middleware/auth.js';
import auditLog from '../../middleware/auditLog.js';
import { scanLimiter } from '../../middleware/security.js';

const router = Router();

const repo = new ScanRepository(getScanDb());
const service = new ScanService(repo);
const controller = new ScanController(service);

router.use(authenticate);
router.use(auditLog('scan'));
router.use(scanLimiter);

// GET  /api/scan/settings          → controller.getSettings
// GET  /api/scan/barcode/:value     → controller.lookupBarcode
// GET  /api/scan/booklet/:bookletId → controller.getBookletInfo
// POST /api/scan/booklet            → controller.saveBooklet
// GET  /api/scan/productivity       → controller.getProductivity
// GET  /api/scan/booklets           → controller.getBookletList
```

Full verbatim:

```1:171:api/src/modules/scan/scan.routes.js
// ... (all 171 lines shown in read above)
```

## 5. `web/src/pages/AdminSettings.jsx` — TABS constant + tab rendering logic

**First 80 lines (imports, TABS, component state, tab-driven `useEffect`):**

```1:80:web/src/pages/AdminSettings.jsx
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import {
  Settings, Users, Mail, FileText, Plus, KeyRound, Trash2,
  CheckCircle2, AlertCircle, Plug, Loader2, Pencil, Eye,
  ArrowLeft, ToggleLeft, ToggleRight, ShieldCheck,
  Camera, Activity, Clock, Search, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, Shield
} from 'lucide-react';
import { api } from '../services/api';
import './AdminSettings.css';

const TEMPLATE_TYPES = [
  { id: 'first_login',     label: 'First Login / Welcome',          icon: '👋' },
  { id: 'reset_password',  label: 'Password Reset by Admin',         icon: '🔑' },
  { id: 'change_password', label: 'Password Changed Notification',   icon: '🔒' },
  { id: 'otp',             label: 'OTP for Forgot Password',         icon: '🛡' },
];

const TABS = [
  { id: 'users',      label: 'Users',            icon: Users },
  { id: 'smtp',       label: 'SMTP & Email',     icon: Mail },
  { id: 'templates',  label: 'Email Templates',  icon: FileText },
  { id: 'monitoring', label: 'Monitoring',        icon: Camera },
  { id: 'audit',      label: 'Audit Log',         icon: Activity },
];

export default function AdminSettings() {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab]         = useState('users');
  // ... state declarations for users, roles, locations, settings, templates, audit logs ...

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab === 'users')      loadUsers();
    if (activeTab === 'smtp')       loadSettings();
    if (activeTab === 'templates')  loadTemplates();
    if (activeTab === 'monitoring') loadSettings();
    if (activeTab === 'audit')      loadAuditLogs();
  }, [activeTab]);
  // ...
```

**Last 80 lines (Audit Log tab rendering — expandable rows with old/new JSON diff):**

```626:704:web/src/pages/AdminSettings.jsx
              <input type="text" ... value={auditFilter.actionType} onChange=... />
              <input type="date" ... value={auditFilter.dateFrom} onChange=... />
              <input type="date" ... value={auditFilter.dateTo} onChange=... />
              <button ... onClick={() => loadAuditLogs(auditFilter)}>
                <Search size={13} /> Search
              </button>
            </div>
            {/* Table with expandable rows showing OldValues / NewValues as JSON */}
            <table className="data-table">
              <thead><tr><th>Time</th><th>User</th><th>Module</th>
                         <th>Action</th><th>IP</th><th></th></tr></thead>
              <tbody>
                {auditLogs.map(log => (
                  <>
                    <tr onClick={() => setExpandedLog(...)}>
                      <td>{new Date(log.CreatedAt).toLocaleString('en-IN')}</td>
                      <td>{log.FullName || log.Username}</td>
                      <td><span className="badge badge-blue">{log.ModuleName}</span></td>
                      <td>{log.ActionType}</td>
                      <td>{log.IPAddress}</td>
                      <td>{expandedLog === log.LogID ? <ChevronUp/> : <ChevronDown/>}</td>
                    </tr>
                    {expandedLog === log.LogID && (
                      <tr><td colSpan={6}>
                        <pre>{JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(log.OldValues), null, 2)}</pre>
                        <pre>{JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(log.NewValues), null, 2)}</pre>
                        <div>{log.DeviceInfo}</div>
                      </td></tr>
                    )}
                  </>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

The TABS constant defines **5 tabs**: `users`, `smtp`, `templates`, `monitoring`, `audit`. The `useEffect` keyed on `activeTab` lazy-loads data for whichever tab becomes active.

---

## 6. `docker/mysql-init/01_schema.sql` — First 120 Lines

```1:120:docker/mysql-init/01_schema.sql
-- SCANNING & EVALUATION SYSTEM - FULL PRODUCTION DDL
-- Database Engine: MySQL 8+

CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS ScanningDB CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 ...;
CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS EvaluationDB CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 ...;

USE ScanningDB;

CREATE TABLE Scan_Locations (
    LocationID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    LocationCode VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    LocationName VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    Address VARCHAR(500),
    IsActive TINYINT DEFAULT 1,
    -- + full audit columns (CreatedBy/At/FromIP/FromSystem, Modified*, IsDeleted, Deleted*)
) ENGINE=InnoDB;

CREATE TABLE Scan_Workstations (
    WorkstationID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    LocationID INT,
    WorkstationCode VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    WorkstationName VARCHAR(200),
    IsActive TINYINT DEFAULT 1,
    FOREIGN KEY (LocationID) REFERENCES Scan_Locations(LocationID)
    -- + audit columns
) ENGINE=InnoDB;

CREATE TABLE Scan_Roles (
    RoleID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    RoleName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    RoleHierarchyLevel INT NOT NULL,
    -- + audit columns
) ENGINE=InnoDB;

CREATE TABLE Scan_Users (
    UserID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    Username VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,
    PasswordHash VARCHAR(500),
    FullName VARCHAR(200),
    RoleID INT,
    LocationID INT,
    IsActive TINYINT DEFAULT 1,
    FOREIGN KEY (RoleID) REFERENCES Scan_Roles(RoleID),
    FOREIGN KEY (LocationID) REFERENCES Scan_Locations(LocationID),
    -- + audit columns
) ENGINE=InnoDB;

CREATE TABLE Scan_Exams (   -- line 119-120 starts here ...
    ExamID INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
```

The schema establishes **two databases** (`ScanningDB`, `EvaluationDB`), then creates the first 5 tables of `ScanningDB` within lines 1–120: `Scan_Locations`, `Scan_Workstations`, `Scan_Roles`, `Scan_Users`, and the start of `Scan_Exams`. Every table follows a consistent pattern of business columns + a full set of 14 audit/soft-delete columns.

---

## 7. All Files Under `docker/mysql-init/`

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `01_schema.sql` | Full DDL — creates `ScanningDB` + `EvaluationDB` with all tables, FKs, and indexes |
| `02_seed.sql` | Reference/seed data — inserts roles, default admin user, exam/paper/location bootstrap rows |
| `03_user_lifecycle.sql` | User lifecycle stored procedures/events — password reset, OTP, expiry, session cleanup |
| `04_monitoring.sql` | Monitoring tables/procedures — DB health metrics, audit log archiving, performance tracking |

These four files are executed in numeric order by the MySQL Docker entrypoint (`docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/`), building the complete schema before the API container starts.
